hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs to create an auditable onboarding workflow that consolidates company registry, UBO, sanctions, and risk reviews in one system.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Company checks remain disconnected and manual
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with fragmented company registry data and disjointed KYB outputs that slow onboarding and increase manual work. This separation makes it difficult to maintain a clear audit trail and support consistent, defensible onboarding decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates company registry data, KYB provider results, ownership reviews and sanctions screening into one structured onboarding workflow to streamline review, maintain audit evidence and support consistent decision tracking.
workflow_title: From company checks to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects company registry checks, sanctions screening and provider outputs into risk-based review, decision logging and audit-ready onboarding approval workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond disconnected checks. One onboarding workflow
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects company registry, KYC and KYB provider outputs into one structured workflow that supports decision evidence, risk review and audit-ready onboarding control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing company checks with provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and governance to meet bank due diligence and enterprise deployment standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and registry checks into one structured compliance workflow to help teams manage onboarding, risk review, decisions, evidence and reporting efficiently.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage company checks workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates company registry, UBO, sanctions and adverse media checks into risk-based review workflows, supporting case creation, decision logging and compliance rule alignment for consistent onboarding.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready onboarding evidence by recording decision logs, provider outputs, case history and reviewer actions for clear traceability and internal or external audit readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC/KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with multiple KYC and KYB providers, integrating their outputs without replacing them to create a connected compliance operating layer over existing tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but sits above them, structuring their outputs into workflows, decisions, cases and evidence for better compliance control.
final_title: Structure company checks into audit-ready workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects company registry, UBO, sanctions and risk data into one controlled onboarding workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
